text:
There once was a curious bird who lived on an island. His favorite place was by the beach, watching seagulls fly overhead. One morning he noticed something unusual. An owl, unlike any bird he’d ever seen, sat beside him. Interesting... the owl spoke. “I notice you like seagulls. I think I love them too. Especially their calls.”

Curiosity fluttered in the bird’s eyes. “You speak? That’s marvelous. I didn’t expect an owl.”

“Oh, I hear everything!”

“There’s that gull calling…”

“It says, ‘Oh no!’”

The owl laughed. “Oh gosh.”

The bird thought about it. “Say something lovely.”

The owl fluttered its wings. “Listen to this.”

She sang a beautiful song birds made. The bird listened, entranced.

The owl chirped. “I love that song. You sing that whenever you feel fancy.”

Every afternoon, they sang together. Birds flew by, keen on
